channel.title: UB Analytics · World Cup 2026 Predictions
channel.description: Matchday predictions with public track record.

item.title: Canada vs Bosnia and Herzegovina: Canada by 2 (75%)
item.description: Group B, 2026-06-12, Toronto. Canada 75% / draw 17% / Bosnia and Herzegovina 8%. Predicted margin 2.

item.title: United States vs Paraguay: Paraguay by 1 (40%)
item.description: Group D, 2026-06-12, Inglewood. United States 31% / draw 29% / Paraguay 40%. Predicted margin 1.
